channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Replit’s Amjad Masad on the Cursor deal, fighting Apple, and why he’d rather not sell
item.description: At TechCrunch's sold-out StrictlyVC event in San Francisco on Thursday night, we covered a lot of ground in a short time, beginning with the question everyone in the industry is asking right now: in a world where rival Cursor is reportedly in talks to be acquired by SpaceX for $60 billion, is Replit also bound to sell?

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Saturday, May 2 (game #1559)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Saturday, May 2 (game #1056)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Saturday, May 2 (game #790)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: 3 swoon-worthy romantic movies to watch on HBO Max in May 2026
item.description: Wuthering Heights leads the line up of new HBO Max romantic movies you won't want to miss in May.

item.title: Musely secures $360M from General Catalyst without giving up equity
item.description: The DTC skin, hair, and menopause care brand will use the non-dilutive capital to super-charge customer acquisition.

item.title: Waymo Is Trying to Crack Down on Solo Kids in Driverless Cars
item.description: As adult riders report new age-verification checks, the self-driving car company says it’s continuing to “refine” its system in places where kids aren’t allowed to ride alone.

item.title: Meta buys robotics startup to bolster its humanoid AI ambitions
item.description: Meta bought humanoid startup Assured Robot Intelligence to beef up its AI models for robots, the company said.

item.title: 'Beyond the financial risk, there are real public safety implications': Hackers crawled Canadian streets with SMS blasters, attacking every target in sight — causing 13 million network disruptions and hacking thousands of devices
item.description: Hackers used vehicle-mounted SMS blasters to impersonate networks, disrupt millions of connections, and infiltrate thousands of devices across Toronto streets.

item.title: Microsoft tests redesigned Windows 11 Run menu with dark mode and more
item.description: Microsoft is testing its much-needed refresh for the Windows 11 Run menu, offering a modern interface that the company says is faster and comes with support for dark mode. The redesign is rolling out now to Windows 11 Insiders in the new Experimental Channel. In a blog post explaining the changes, Microsoft says it decided […]
